title: Black Treacle Steam Veggie Delight
description: A one-pot Ethiopian dish featuring bitter and crisp vegetables steamed with black treacle for a plant-based, savory twist.
instructions: Heat a large pot over medium heat and add black treacle. Stir until it melts and slightly caramelizes.
Add finely chopped onion, minced garlic, cumin seeds, turmeric powder, and salt to the melted black treacle. Cook for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add thinly sliced carrots, trimmed green beans, and broccoli florets. Toss gently to coat with the liquid mixture from the pot.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then cover with a lid and steam until all vegetables are tender but still have a slight crunch, about 10-15 minutes.
